programme.desc: Stay informed with the latest breaking news and headlines.

programme.title: The Intern
programme.desc: Starting a new job can be a difficult challenge, especially if you're already retired. Looking to get back into the game, 70-year-old widower Ben Whittaker (Robert De Niro) seizes the opportunity to become a senior intern at an online fashion site. Ben soon becomes popular with his younger co-workers, including Jules Ostin (Anne Hathaway), the boss and founder of the company. Whittaker's charm, wisdom and sense of humor help him develop a special bond and growing friendship with Jules.

programme.desc: When Charlie swears his love to Chelsea (Jennifer Taylor), her response is nothing like what he'd expected.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Charlie fights the overwhelming urge to flee when Chelsea gets sick and he is forced to take care of her.

programme.title: In Touch With Dr. Charles Stanley
programme.desc: Charles Stanley, pastor of the First Baptist Church in Atlanta, shares his insights on Christian faith and enlightens viewers with spiritual motivation.

programme.desc: A murder suspect spits on his lawyer; a literal "Karen" is fined for refusing to wear a mask in a supermarket; a judge has had it with a rude defendant.

programme.title: Judy Justice
programme.desc: A young widow with a newborn baby claims her deceased husband's best friend stole money from his account; the best friend defends his actions passionately and says the money went to a GoFundMe set up for his children.

programme.desc: As Maggie digs into the reasons for her ex-husband Liam's return, Cal finds himself struggling with feelings of jealousy as tensions at the Crossing rise.

programme.desc: Max and Ellis go undercover to catch a pool shark's killer; Max's mom, Vivienne, is miraculously back from the grave, and she's brought back a vengeful crime lord in pursuit of her, which puts them all in the crosshairs.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Desperate for more income, Becky seeks a bartending position at Casita Bonita, causing major concern for Dan due to her struggle with alcoholism; Darlene finally nears a decision between David and Ben; Harris' new friend, Odessa, means new trouble.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: Some of the wildest courtroom moments, featuring accused killers; a 28-year-old man who killed his parents for no longer financially supporting him; a woman who kills her husband in their bed; a man who murders his wife, then calls the authorities.
